heading: SCHOOL NAME
operative_text: The name of a college or university charter school or junior college charter school must include the name of the public senior college or university or public junior college, as applicable, operating the school.
_note: No cross-references or defined terms appear in this section. Terms such as 'college or university charter school' and 'junior college charter school' are likely defined elsewhere in Chapter 12 but are not defined in this excerpt.
